categories.name: General-Purpose AutoML
categories.description: End-to-end frameworks that automate model selection, hyperparameter tuning, and pipeline construction.

entries.name: Ludwig
entries.description: Declarative deep learning framework supporting custom model building and LLM fine-tuning via YAML configs. Now under Linux Foundation AI & Data.
entries.tagline: Declarative deep learning via YAML configs

entries.name: AutoGluon
entries.description: Multi-layer stack ensembling for tabular, text, image, time-series, and multimodal data - won medals in 15/18 Kaggle tabular contests in 2024 (Amazon).
entries.tagline: Multi-modal stack ensembling, Kaggle champion

entries.name: TPOT
entries.description: Genetic programming-based pipeline optimizer that designs and optimizes scikit-learn pipelines.
entries.tagline: Genetic programming pipeline optimizer for sklearn

entries.name: PyCaret
entries.description: Low-code machine learning library that automates model training, tuning, and deployment workflows in Python.
entries.tagline: Low-code AutoML from training to deployment

entries.name: AutoKeras
entries.description: Neural architecture search for deep learning models built on top of Keras.
entries.tagline: Neural architecture search built on Keras

entries.name: auto-sklearn
entries.description: Historically important AutoML toolkit using Bayesian optimization, meta-learning, and ensemble construction.
entries.tagline: Bayesian optimization and meta-learning AutoML
entries.note: Unmaintained since Sep 2022; broken on Python 3.10+.

entries.name: H2O AutoML
entries.description: Distributed machine learning platform with automatic training and tuning of many models within a user-specified time limit.
entries.tagline: Enterprise distributed AutoML with time limits

entries.name: FLAML
entries.description: Fast and lightweight AutoML that finds good models with minimal resources - often the best choice for resource-constrained environments (Microsoft).
entries.tagline: Fast AutoML with minimal compute resources

entries.name: LazyPredict
entries.description: Build and evaluate dozens of scikit-learn models in a single line of code for rapid baseline comparison.
entries.tagline: Dozens of sklearn models in one line

entries.name: MLJAR Supervised
entries.description: Automated ML with automatic explanations, visualizations, and Markdown reports for every trained model.
entries.tagline: AutoML with per-model reports and explanations

entries.name: LightAutoML
entries.description: Fast and customizable AutoML framework with Kaggle-winning performance (Sber AI Lab).
entries.tagline: Fast customizable AutoML with Kaggle wins

entries.name: EvalML
entries.description: AutoML library for building, optimizing, and evaluating ML pipelines with domain-specific objectives (Alteryx).
entries.tagline: AutoML pipelines with domain-specific objectives

entries.name: SapientML
entries.description: Generative AutoML that synthesizes pipelines by learning from a corpus of existing ML solutions.
entries.tagline: Generative AutoML from corpus of ML solutions

entries.name: Auto-WEKA
entries.description: The original AutoML system (2013) combining algorithm selection and HPO in WEKA.
entries.tagline: Original AutoML combining algorithm selection and HPO

entries.name: GAMA
entries.description: AutoML tool that generates optimized ML pipelines using genetic programming and Bayesian optimization (OpenML).
entries.tagline: Genetic programming and Bayesian pipeline optimization

categories.name: Foundation Models as AutoML
categories.description: Pretrained models that replace traditional pipeline-search AutoML with a single forward pass or zero-shot inference.

entries.name: TimesFM
entries.description: Time-series foundation model for zero-shot forecasting across domains without task-specific training (Google).
entries.tagline: Zero-shot time-series forecasting foundation model

entries.name: TabPFN
entries.description: Tabular foundation model that matches tuned XGBoost in 2.8 seconds with a single forward pass - 100% win rate vs default XGBoost on datasets under 10K rows (Nature 2024, now v2.6 supporting up to 100K rows).
entries.tagline: Beats tuned XGBoost in 2.8 seconds flat

entries.name: Chronos
entries.description: Pretrained time-series foundation model for zero-shot probabilistic forecasting on unseen data (Amazon).
entries.tagline: Pretrained probabilistic forecasting on unseen time-series

entries.name: Moirai
entries.description: Universal time-series forecasting transformer supporting multivariate forecasting unlike most competitors. Moirai-MoE released Oct 2024 (Salesforce).
entries.tagline: Universal multivariate time-series forecasting transformer

entries.name: TabM
entries.description: Parameter-efficient ensemble of MLPs based on BatchEnsemble, achieving top performance among tabular deep learning models without attention complexity (ICLR 2025, Yandex).
entries.tagline: Efficient MLP ensemble for top tabular performance

entries.name: TALENT
entries.description: Comprehensive toolkit and benchmark for tabular learning covering 35+ deep methods across 300 datasets.
entries.tagline: Benchmark toolkit for 35+ tabular deep methods

entries.name: TabICL
entries.description: State-of-the-art tabular foundation model achieving 10x faster inference than TabPFN v2.5 (ICML 2025).
entries.tagline: Tabular foundation model 10x faster than TabPFN

entries.name: CARTE
entries.description: Context-aware tabular representation using pretrained language models for data with heterogeneous columns.
entries.tagline: LLM-powered representation for heterogeneous tabular data

categories.name: Automated Fine-Tuning
categories.description: Tools that automate the process of adapting large language models to specific tasks and domains.

entries.name: LLaMA-Factory
entries.description: Unified fine-tuning framework for 100+ LLMs and VLMs with Full, LoRA, QLoRA, and DoRA methods plus web UI (ACL 2024).
entries.tagline: Unified fine-tuning for 100+ LLMs with web UI

entries.name: Unsloth
entries.description: Fine-tune LLMs 2-5x faster with 80% less memory on a single GPU through optimized kernels and custom autograd.
entries.tagline: Fine-tune LLMs 2-5x faster, 80% less memory

entries.name: PEFT
entries.description: Standard library for parameter-efficient fine-tuning - LoRA, QLoRA, Spectrum, and more. Deeply integrated with the Hugging Face ecosystem.
entries.tagline: Standard LoRA and parameter-efficient fine-tuning library

entries.name: TRL
entries.description: Transformer Reinforcement Learning with SFT, DPO, RLHF, and GRPO trainers for alignment and preference tuning (Hugging Face).
entries.tagline: RLHF, DPO, and GRPO trainers for LLM alignment

entries.name: LitGPT
entries.description: Recipes for pretraining, fine-tuning, and deploying 20+ LLM architectures on your own data (Lightning AI).
entries.tagline: Pretrain, fine-tune, and deploy 20+ LLM architectures

entries.name: Axolotl
entries.description: Production-grade fine-tuning with multi-GPU support, sequence parallelism, and multimodal capabilities.
entries.tagline: Production-grade multi-GPU fine-tuning framework

entries.name: LMFlow
entries.description: Extensible toolkit for fine-tuning and inference of large foundation models, NAACL 2024 Best Demo Award.
entries.tagline: Extensible fine-tuning toolkit, NAACL 2024 award

entries.name: torchtune
entries.description: Native PyTorch library for fine-tuning LLMs with composable building blocks and YAML configs (Meta).
entries.tagline: Native PyTorch LLM fine-tuning with YAML configs

entries.name: Hugging Face AutoTrain
entries.description: No-code training for LLMs, vision-language models, text classification, and tabular data (Hugging Face).
entries.tagline: No-code LLM and vision-language model training

entries.name: LoRAX
entries.description: Multi-LoRA inference server that scales to thousands of fine-tuned LLMs on a single GPU (Predibase).
entries.tagline: Thousands of LoRA adapters on a single GPU

entries.name: H2O LLM Studio
entries.description: No-code GUI for fine-tuning LLMs with SFT, DPO, and RLHF, plus experiment tracking and one-click Hugging Face Hub export (H2O.ai).
entries.tagline: No-code GUI for LLM fine-tuning and RLHF

entries.name: LLM Foundry
entries.description: Composable building blocks for pretraining, fine-tuning, and evaluating foundation models with efficient distributed training (Databricks).
entries.tagline: Composable pretraining and fine-tuning for foundation models

categories.name: Automated Prompt Optimization
categories.description: Systematic optimization of prompts, instructions, and demonstrations to improve LLM performance without manual tuning.

entries.name: DSPy
entries.description: Declarative framework replacing hand-written prompts with automatic optimizers - GPT-3.5 with DSPy outperforms expert prompts by up to 46% (Stanford NLP).
entries.tagline: Automatic prompt optimizers replacing hand-written prompts

entries.name: PromptWizard
entries.description: Task-aware agent-driven prompt optimization using self-evolving critique and synthesis (Microsoft).
entries.tagline: Agent-driven self-evolving prompt optimization

entries.name: TextGrad
entries.description: Automatic differentiation via text feedback, enabling gradient-like optimization of compound AI systems (Nature 2024).
entries.tagline: Gradient-like optimization of AI via text feedback

entries.name: GEPA
entries.description: Reflective text evolution for prompt, code, and text optimization, integrated into MLflow (Cerebras).
entries.tagline: Reflective text evolution for prompt optimization

entries.name: AutoPrompt
entries.description: Intent-based prompt calibration using synthetic data generation for iterative prompt refinement.
entries.tagline: Intent-based iterative prompt calibration with synthetic data

entries.name: Mirascope
entries.description: Pythonic toolkit for building LLM applications with integrated prompt versioning, tracing, and optimization.
entries.tagline: Pythonic LLM toolkit with prompt versioning and tracing

entries.name: Promptomatix
entries.description: DSPy-powered automatic prompt optimization that transforms task descriptions into optimized prompts with cost-aware objectives (Salesforce).
entries.tagline: Task descriptions to optimized prompts automatically

entries.name: Prompt-Ops
entries.description: Open-source command-line tool for building, optimizing, and managing prompts at scale (Meta).
entries.tagline: CLI for building and managing prompts at scale

entries.name: EvoPrompt
entries.description: Connects LLMs with evolutionary algorithms for discrete prompt optimization with up to 25% improvement over manual prompts.
entries.tagline: Evolutionary algorithms for discrete prompt optimization

categories.name: Automated AI Research
categories.description: Autonomous systems that design experiments, run them, and analyze results without human intervention.

entries.name: AutoResearch
entries.description: Minimal script enabling AI agents to autonomously run ~100 ML experiments overnight at ~12/hour, finding genuine improvements that transfer to larger models (Karpathy, March 2026).
entries.tagline: Agents run 100 ML experiments overnight autonomously

entries.name: AutoGen
entries.description: Multi-agent conversation framework for building AI agent systems. Now in maintenance mode as AG2 (Microsoft).
entries.tagline: Multi-agent conversation framework for AI systems

entries.name: CrewAI
entries.description: Multi-agent framework orchestrating role-playing specialist agents for complex AI workflows.
entries.tagline: Role-playing specialist agents for complex workflows

entries.name: STORM
entries.description: LLM-powered knowledge curation that researches topics and generates full articles with citations (Stanford).
entries.tagline: LLM researches topics and writes full articles

entries.name: AI-Scientist
entries.description: Fully automated open-ended scientific discovery from idea generation to experiment execution to paper writing (Sakana AI).
entries.tagline: Fully automated discovery from idea to paper

entries.name: PaperQA
entries.description: High-accuracy retrieval-augmented generation for answering questions from scientific literature.
entries.tagline: High-accuracy RAG over scientific literature

entries.name: AI-Scientist-v2
entries.description: Second generation using agentic tree search, producing the first AI-generated paper accepted at a peer-reviewed workshop.
entries.tagline: First AI paper accepted at peer-reviewed workshop

entries.name: AI-Researcher
entries.description: Autonomous agent automating the full research lifecycle from literature review to experimentation (NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight).
entries.tagline: Full research lifecycle from literature to experiments

entries.name: AIDE
entries.description: ML engineering agent using tree search over solution space - exceeds 50% of human Kaggle competitors; top agents using AIDE achieve medals in 64%+ of MLE-Bench competitions (Weco AI).
entries.tagline: ML agent beating 50% of human Kaggle competitors

entries.name: AutoML-Agent
entries.description: Multi-agent LLM framework for full-pipeline AutoML from data retrieval through model deployment (ICML 2025).
entries.tagline: LLM agents for end-to-end AutoML pipelines

categories.name: ML Engineering Agents
categories.description: AI agents that autonomously write, debug, and optimize code for software and ML engineering.

entries.name: OpenHands
entries.description: AI software development platform achieving 53-72% resolve rate on SWE-Bench Verified.
entries.tagline: AI dev platform, 53-72% SWE-Bench resolve rate

entries.name: Aider
entries.description: AI pair programmer in the terminal that edits code directly in your local repository.
entries.tagline: AI pair programmer editing your local repository

entries.name: SWE-agent
entries.description: Autonomous agent that solves real GitHub issues by reading, editing, and testing code (NeurIPS 2024).
entries.tagline: Autonomous agent solving real GitHub issues

entries.name: mini-swe-agent
entries.description: Minimalist 100-line coding agent achieving 74% on SWE-bench Verified as a learning reference.
entries.tagline: 100-line agent with 74% SWE-bench score

entries.name: AutoCodeRover
entries.description: Structure-aware autonomous program repair combining code search with LLM-based patching.
entries.tagline: Structure-aware autonomous code repair and patching

entries.name: AutoRAG
entries.description: AutoML-style framework for RAG optimization that automatically finds the best retrieval, generation, and prompt pipeline configuration.
entries.tagline: AutoML-style search for optimal RAG pipelines

categories.name: LLM Evaluation and Testing
categories.description: Frameworks for automated evaluation, testing, and benchmarking of language models and AI systems.

entries.name: Promptfoo
entries.description: Test and red-team LLM applications with automated evaluations, CI/CD integration, and vulnerability scanning.
entries.tagline: Test and red-team LLMs with CI/CD integration

entries.name: DeepEval
entries.description: Pytest-like framework with 14+ evaluation metrics for RAG, fine-tuning, and alignment assessment.
entries.tagline: Pytest-style LLM evaluation with 14+ metrics

entries.name: RAGAS
entries.description: Evaluation framework for RAG quality assessment measuring both retrieval and generation with LLM-based and traditional metrics.
entries.tagline: Evaluate RAG retrieval and generation quality

entries.name: lm-evaluation-harness
entries.description: Standard framework for few-shot evaluation of language models across hundreds of benchmarks (EleutherAI).
entries.tagline: Standard few-shot LLM evaluation across hundreds of benchmarks

entries.name: OpenCompass
entries.description: One-stop evaluation platform supporting 100+ models across academic and real-world benchmarks.
entries.tagline: One-stop evaluation for 100+ LLMs and benchmarks

entries.name: Agenta
entries.description: Open-source LLMOps platform combining prompt playground, evaluation workflows, and production observability.
entries.tagline: LLMOps platform with playground and evaluation

entries.name: TruLens
entries.description: OpenTelemetry-based tracing and evaluation for RAG and agent workflows with built-in feedback functions (Snowflake/TruEra).
entries.tagline: OpenTelemetry tracing and evaluation for RAG agents

entries.name: LangWatch
entries.description: Evaluation and testing platform for LLM applications and AI agents with automated quality guardrails.
entries.tagline: LLM evaluation platform with automated quality guardrails

entries.name: LightEval
entries.description: All-in-one LLM evaluation toolkit powering the Open LLM Leaderboard, supporting 1000+ tasks across multiple backends (Hugging Face).
entries.tagline: Powers the Open LLM Leaderboard, 1000+ tasks

entries.name: Inspect AI
entries.description: Framework for reproducible LLM evals with sandboxed agent execution, 100+ prebuilt evaluations, and VS Code integration (UK AI Safety Institute).
entries.tagline: Reproducible sandboxed LLM evals, 100+ prebuilt

categories.name: LLM Routing and Selection
categories.description: Intelligent routing of requests to the optimal model based on task complexity, cost, and performance.

entries.name: LiteLLM
entries.description: Unified API gateway for 100+ LLMs with load balancing, cost tracking, and automatic fallback routing.
entries.tagline: Unified API gateway for 100+ LLMs

entries.name: Portkey Gateway
entries.description: AI gateway for intelligent routing, caching, load balancing, and fallbacks across 200+ LLMs.
entries.tagline: AI gateway routing and caching across 200+ LLMs

entries.name: RouteLLM
entries.description: Framework for training and serving LLM routers that reduce costs by up to 85% without quality loss (LMSYS).
entries.tagline: LLM routers cutting costs 85% without quality loss

entries.name: LLMRouter
entries.description: Unified library with 16+ router implementations and standardized evaluation via command-line interface.
entries.tagline: 16+ LLM router implementations with unified evaluation

entries.name: TensorZero
entries.description: Open-source LLMOps platform unifying an LLM gateway, observability, evaluation, optimization, and experimentation with A/B testing across models.
entries.tagline: LLMOps platform with gateway, evals, and A/B testing

categories.name: Time-Series AutoML
categories.description: Automated forecasting, classification, and anomaly detection for temporal data.

entries.name: sktime
entries.description: Unified framework for time-series forecasting, classification, regression, and clustering with scikit-learn-compatible interfaces.
entries.tagline: Unified sklearn-compatible time-series ML toolkit

entries.name: Darts
entries.description: Unified API for 30+ forecasting models from ARIMA to transformers, with backtesting and ensembling built in.
entries.tagline: Unified API for 30+ forecasting models with backtesting

entries.name: Nixtla StatsForecast
entries.description: Lightning-fast statistical models including AutoARIMA, AutoETS, and AutoCES for millions of time series.
entries.tagline: Lightning-fast AutoARIMA and AutoETS at scale

entries.name: Merlion
entries.description: Time-series intelligence library with unified interfaces for forecasting, anomaly detection, and change-point detection (Salesforce).
entries.tagline: Unified forecasting, anomaly, and change-point detection

entries.name: Nixtla NeuralForecast
entries.description: Production-ready neural forecasting with 30+ state-of-the-art models including N-BEATS, TFT, and PatchTST.
entries.tagline: Production neural forecasting with 30+ models

entries.name: PyPOTS
entries.description: Toolbox with 50+ deep learning models for partially-observed time-series imputation, classification, and clustering.
entries.tagline: 50+ models for missing-value time-series analysis

entries.name: Lag-Llama
entries.description: First open-source foundation model for univariate probabilistic time-series forecasting based on a decoder-only transformer (NeurIPS 2024).
entries.tagline: First open-source probabilistic time-series foundation model

entries.name: skforecast
entries.description: Scikit-learn-compatible multi-step forecasting with XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, and feature engineering utilities.
entries.tagline: Sklearn-compatible multi-step forecasting with gradient boosting

entries.name: AutoTS
entries.description: Genetic algorithm-based automated model selection, ensembling, and anomaly detection for time-series data.
entries.tagline: Genetic algorithm AutoML for time-series forecasting

entries.name: aeon
entries.description: Next-generation time-series ML toolkit for classification, regression, clustering, and anomaly detection.
entries.tagline: Next-generation time-series ML for all task types

entries.name: Nixtla MLForecast
entries.description: Scalable ML-based forecasting with LightGBM, XGBoost, and distributed backends via Dask, Spark, and Ray.
entries.tagline: Scalable LightGBM and XGBoost time-series forecasting

entries.name: Time-MoE
entries.description: First billion-scale time-series foundation model using sparse mixture-of-experts, trained on 300B+ time points (ICLR 2025 Spotlight).
entries.tagline: Billion-scale sparse MoE time-series foundation model

entries.name: Granite-TSFM
entries.description: Compact pretrained Tiny Time Mixers that rival billion-parameter models for zero/few-shot multivariate forecasting (IBM, NeurIPS 2024).
entries.tagline: Compact mixers rivaling billion-parameter forecasting models

categories.name: Neural Architecture Search
categories.description: Automated design and discovery of optimal neural network architectures.

entries.name: NNI
entries.description: Comprehensive AutoML toolkit for NAS, hyperparameter tuning, feature engineering, and model compression.
entries.tagline: Comprehensive NAS, HPO, and model compression toolkit

entries.name: Google AutoML
entries.description: Research code for EfficientNet, EfficientDet, MnasNet, and other NAS-discovered architectures (Google Brain).
entries.tagline: Research code behind EfficientNet and EfficientDet

entries.name: Once-For-All
entries.description: Train one network and specialize sub-networks for diverse hardware without retraining (MIT HAN Lab, ICLR 2020).
entries.tagline: Train once, deploy specialized sub-networks anywhere

entries.name: TinyEngine
entries.description: Memory-efficient inference engine for NAS-optimized models on microcontrollers (MIT HAN Lab).
entries.tagline: Inference engine for NAS models on microcontrollers

entries.name: Vega
entries.description: AutoML pipeline covering NAS, hyperparameter optimization, auto-augmentation, and model compression (Huawei).
entries.tagline: Full AutoML pipeline with NAS and compression

entries.name: NASLib
entries.description: NAS research library from AutoML Freiburg with interfaces to state-of-the-art search spaces and optimizers.
entries.tagline: NAS research library with standardized search spaces

entries.name: Archai
entries.description: Modular NAS framework for reproducible architecture search research (Microsoft).
entries.tagline: Modular NAS framework for reproducible research

categories.name: Hyperparameter Optimization
categories.description: Automated tuning of model hyperparameters using Bayesian, evolutionary, and other search strategies.

entries.name: Ray Tune
entries.description: Distributed hyperparameter tuning at scale with support for any ML framework and many search algorithms.
entries.tagline: Distributed HPO at scale for any ML framework

entries.name: Optuna
entries.description: Define-by-run API with pruning, distributed execution, and a dashboard - the most widely adopted HPO framework.
entries.tagline: Most widely adopted HPO framework with pruning

entries.name: Hyperopt
entries.description: Pioneered tree-structured Parzen estimators for HPO.
entries.tagline: Pioneer of tree-structured Parzen estimators for HPO
entries.note: Deprecated since Nov 2021 - use Optuna instead.

entries.name: BoTorch
entries.description: Bayesian optimization library in PyTorch for high-dimensional, noisy, and multi-objective problems (Meta).
entries.tagline: PyTorch Bayesian optimization for multi-objective problems

entries.name: Keras Tuner
entries.description: Hyperparameter search for Keras models with built-in Bayesian optimization and Hyperband.
entries.tagline: Hyperparameter search for Keras with Bayesian and Hyperband

entries.name: Ax
entries.description: Adaptive experimentation platform for multi-objective optimization with BoTorch integration (Meta).
entries.tagline: Adaptive experimentation for multi-objective optimization

entries.name: SMAC3
entries.description: Sequential model-based algorithm configuration combining Bayesian optimization with racing mechanisms (AutoML Freiburg).
entries.tagline: Bayesian HPO with racing mechanisms for algorithm configuration

entries.name: Dragonfly
entries.description: Scalable Bayesian optimization library supporting multi-fidelity and multi-objective search.
entries.tagline: Scalable Bayesian optimization with multi-fidelity search

entries.name: Google Vizier
entries.description: Research interface for blackbox and hyperparameter optimization with Bayesian, evolutionary, and multi-objective algorithms based on Google's internal Vizier Service.
entries.tagline: Open-source interface to Google's internal HPO service

categories.name: Automated Feature Engineering
categories.description: Automated generation, transformation, and selection of features from raw data.

entries.name: Cleanlab
entries.description: Data-centric AI toolkit for finding and fixing label errors, outliers, and data quality issues automatically.
entries.tagline: Automatically find and fix label errors in datasets

entries.name: tsfresh
entries.description: Automatic extraction of hundreds of time-series features with built-in statistical relevance filtering.
entries.tagline: Auto-extract hundreds of time-series features with filtering

entries.name: Featuretools
entries.description: Deep feature synthesis for automatically creating meaningful features from relational and temporal data (Alteryx).
entries.tagline: Deep feature synthesis for relational and temporal data

entries.name: OpenMLDB
entries.description: Database for consistent feature computation between training and serving with SQL-based feature engineering (SIGMOD 2025).
entries.tagline: SQL-based feature engineering consistent across train and serve

entries.name: Boruta
entries.description: All-relevant feature selection wrapper using random forest shadow features to identify important predictors.
entries.tagline: All-relevant feature selection via random forest shadows

entries.name: AutoFeat
entries.description: Scikit-learn-compatible automated feature engineering and selection that generates non-linear features and selects robust subsets.
entries.tagline: Sklearn-compatible non-linear feature generation and selection

entries.name: CAAFE
entries.description: LLM-powered context-aware feature engineering that generates semantically meaningful features with explanations.
entries.tagline: LLM generates semantically meaningful features with explanations

entries.name: Feature-engine
entries.description: Scikit-learn-compatible transformers for feature creation, selection, encoding, and imputation.
entries.tagline: Sklearn transformers for feature creation and selection

entries.name: NVTabular
entries.description: GPU-accelerated feature engineering and preprocessing for terabyte-scale tabular data with automatic hashing, categorification, and normalization (NVIDIA).
entries.tagline: GPU-accelerated feature engineering for terabyte tabular data

categories.name: Automated Data Preprocessing
categories.description: Automated data profiling, cleaning, validation, and quality assurance.

entries.name: ydata-profiling
entries.description: One-line data quality profiling and exploratory analysis for Pandas and Spark DataFrames.
entries.tagline: One-line EDA profiling for Pandas and Spark

entries.name: Great Expectations
entries.description: Programmable data validation and documentation framework for maintaining pipeline quality.
entries.tagline: Programmable data validation for pipeline quality

entries.name: Pandera
entries.description: Statistical data testing and validation for dataframes with expressive schema definitions.
entries.tagline: Statistical schema validation for dataframes

entries.name: SweetViz
entries.description: High-density EDA visualizations and target analysis reports generated in two lines of code.
entries.tagline: High-density EDA visualizations in two lines of code

entries.name: DataPrep
entries.description: Low-code library for data collection, cleaning, and EDA that is 10x faster than traditional profiling.
entries.tagline: Low-code data cleaning and EDA, 10x faster

entries.name: Optimus
entries.description: Agile data preparation supporting Pandas, Dask, cuDF, and PySpark with a unified API.
entries.tagline: Unified data prep API across Pandas, Spark, and GPU

entries.name: Spotlight
entries.description: Interactive visualization tool for auditing and understanding unstructured ML datasets covering images, audio, and text.
entries.tagline: Interactive auditing of unstructured ML datasets

entries.name: pyjanitor
entries.description: Clean APIs for data cleaning with a fluent method-chaining interface for pandas DataFrames, inspired by the R Janitor package.
entries.tagline: Fluent method-chaining data cleaning for pandas

categories.name: Automated Data Labeling
categories.description: Tools that automate or semi-automate the annotation process using AI-assisted labeling.

entries.name: Label Studio
entries.description: Multi-type data labeling platform with ML-assisted annotation and LLM integration for text, images, audio, and video.
entries.tagline: ML-assisted labeling for text, images, audio, video

entries.name: Snorkel
entries.description: Programmatic labeling via weak supervision - write labeling functions instead of hand-labeling.
entries.tagline: Write labeling functions instead of hand-labeling data

entries.name: Argilla
entries.description: Collaboration platform for collecting and managing human and AI feedback for NLP and LLM development.
entries.tagline: Collaborative human and AI feedback for LLM development

entries.name: Distilabel
entries.description: Framework for synthetic data generation, AI feedback, and instruction tuning using Self-Instruct and EvolInstruct techniques.
entries.tagline: Synthetic data generation with Self-Instruct and EvolInstruct

entries.name: Autodistill
entries.description: Automated image labeling by distilling foundation model knowledge into smaller task-specific models (Roboflow).
entries.tagline: Distill foundation models into task-specific labelers

entries.name: Autolabel
entries.description: LLM-powered labeling, cleaning, and enrichment for text classification, NER, and entity matching.
entries.tagline: LLM-powered labeling for classification, NER, and matching

entries.name: X-AnyLabeling
entries.description: AI-assisted annotation with Segment Anything and other foundation models for automatic segmentation, detection, and classification pre-labeling.
entries.tagline: SAM-powered annotation for auto-segmentation and detection

entries.name: Adala
entries.description: Autonomous data labeling agent that uses LLMs to label data, learn from ground truth, and iteratively improve labeling quality (Label Studio team).
entries.tagline: Autonomous LLM agent iteratively improving labeling quality

entries.name: LabelU
entries.description: Multi-modal annotation toolbox supporting image, audio, and video with configurable templates and collaborative labeling workflows.
entries.tagline: Multi-modal annotation for image, audio, and video

categories.name: Synthetic Data Generation
categories.description: Automated creation of artificial training data that preserves statistical properties of real datasets.

entries.name: SDV
entries.description: Synthetic Data Vault with multiple generative models (GaussianCopula, CTGAN, TVAE) for single-table, multi-table, and sequential data.
entries.tagline: Synthetic tabular data vault with multiple generative models

entries.name: SDG
entries.description: Framework for generating high-quality synthetic tabular data preserving statistical distributions and correlations.
entries.tagline: Synthetic tabular data preserving statistical distributions

entries.name: DataDreamer
entries.description: Reproducible LLM workflows for prompting, synthetic data generation, and model training in one pipeline.
entries.tagline: Reproducible LLM pipelines for synthetic data and training

entries.name: Gretel Synthetics
entries.description: Synthetic data generators for structured and unstructured text with differential privacy guarantees.
entries.tagline: Privacy-preserving synthetic data with differential privacy

entries.name: Curator
entries.description: Pipeline-oriented synthetic data curation for post-training and structured data extraction with built-in quality filtering from LLMs.
entries.tagline: Pipeline synthetic data curation with LLM quality filtering

entries.name: Synthetic Data Kit
entries.description: Toolkit for generating high-quality synthetic datasets to fine-tune models with LLM-generated training data at scale (Meta).
entries.tagline: LLM-generated training data at scale for fine-tuning

entries.name: NeMo Data Designer
entries.description: Generates high-quality synthetic data from scratch or seed data with built-in evaluation and quality control for LLM training pipelines (NVIDIA).
entries.tagline: Generates and evaluates synthetic data for LLM pipelines

categories.name: Automated Model Compression
categories.description: Automated quantization, pruning, and distillation for efficient model deployment.

entries.name: LLM-AWQ
entries.description: Activation-aware weight quantization achieving lossless 4-bit compression for LLMs (MIT HAN Lab, MLSys 2024 Best Paper).
entries.tagline: Lossless 4-bit LLM quantization via activation awareness

entries.name: Torch-Pruning
entries.description: Structural pruning framework for any PyTorch model including LLMs, YOLO, ViT, and diffusion models (CVPR 2023).
entries.tagline: Structural pruning for any PyTorch model

entries.name: LLM Compressor
entries.description: Transformers-compatible compression library optimized for efficient vLLM inference.
entries.tagline: Transformers-compatible compression optimized for vLLM

entries.name: Intel Neural Compressor
entries.description: Unified quantization, sparsity, pruning, and distillation across PyTorch, TensorFlow, and ONNX (Intel).
entries.tagline: Unified quantization and pruning across PyTorch and ONNX

entries.name: NVIDIA TensorRT Model Optimizer
entries.description: Quantization, pruning, distillation, and speculative decoding optimized for TensorRT and vLLM deployment.
entries.tagline: Quantization and pruning optimized for TensorRT and vLLM

entries.name: GPTQModel
entries.description: LLM quantization toolkit with support for NVIDIA CUDA, AMD ROCm, Intel, and Apple Silicon backends.
entries.tagline: LLM quantization for CUDA, ROCm, and Apple Silicon

entries.name: bitsandbytes
entries.description: De facto standard for k-bit quantization of LLMs in PyTorch - enables 4-bit and 8-bit inference and training, the backbone for QLoRA.
entries.tagline: De facto 4-bit and 8-bit LLM quantization for PyTorch

entries.name: Optimum
entries.description: Toolkit for accelerating Transformers inference with hardware-optimized quantization, pruning, and graph optimization for ONNX Runtime, OpenVINO, and more (Hugging Face).
entries.tagline: Hardware-optimized Transformers inference and quantization

entries.name: Olive
entries.description: End-to-end model optimization automating fine-tuning, conversion, quantization, and graph optimization for CPUs, GPUs, and NPUs (Microsoft).
entries.tagline: End-to-end model optimization for CPU, GPU, and NPU

categories.name: Automated Deployment and Serving
categories.description: Automated model serving, optimization, and inference infrastructure.

entries.name: Ollama
entries.description: Docker-like local LLM runner for getting models up and running quickly for prototyping.
entries.tagline: Docker-like local LLM runner for fast prototyping

entries.name: llama.cpp
entries.description: LLM inference in C/C++ with broad hardware support - the foundation for most local LLM applications.
entries.tagline: C/C++ LLM inference, foundation for local apps

entries.name: vLLM
entries.description: High-throughput LLM serving engine with PagedAttention, powering most open-source LLM deployments in production.
entries.tagline: High-throughput PagedAttention engine for production LLMs

entries.name: SGLang
entries.description: High-performance LLM serving framework powering 400K+ GPUs with best-in-class structured and constrained decoding.
entries.tagline: High-performance LLM serving with constrained decoding

entries.name: ONNX Runtime
entries.description: Cross-platform inference accelerator supporting PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, and XGBoost via the ONNX format (Microsoft).
entries.tagline: Cross-platform inference accelerator via ONNX format

entries.name: TensorRT-LLM
entries.description: High-performance LLM inference library with custom attention kernels, speculative decoding, and MoE support (NVIDIA).
entries.tagline: NVIDIA's high-performance LLM inference with custom kernels

entries.name: Triton Inference Server
entries.description: Multi-framework inference serving for TensorRT, PyTorch, ONNX, and custom backends (NVIDIA).
entries.tagline: Multi-framework inference server for production deployment

entries.name: OpenVINO
entries.description: Inference optimization and deployment toolkit for CPUs, GPUs, and edge accelerators (Intel).
entries.tagline: Intel inference optimization for CPU, GPU, and edge

entries.name: BentoML
entries.description: Build production-ready inference APIs, batch jobs, and multi-model pipelines with unified Python framework.
entries.tagline: Python framework for production inference APIs and pipelines

entries.name: LMDeploy
entries.description: Toolkit for compressing, deploying, and serving large language and vision-language models.
entries.tagline: Compress, deploy, and serve LLMs and vision models

entries.name: KServe
entries.description: Kubernetes-native standardized model serving with canary rollouts, autoscaling, and multi-framework support (CNCF Incubating).
entries.tagline: Kubernetes-native model serving with canary rollouts

entries.name: ExecuTorch
entries.description: On-device AI inference for mobile, embedded, and edge platforms with a 50KB base runtime footprint (Meta).
entries.tagline: On-device AI inference with 50KB runtime footprint

entries.name: LitServe
entries.description: Minimal, high-performance Python framework for AI model serving (Lightning AI).
entries.tagline: Minimal high-performance Python AI serving framework

entries.name: Cog
entries.description: Package ML models as standard Docker containers with auto-generated HTTP APIs and GPU setup for reproducible, portable deployment (Replicate).
entries.tagline: Package ML models as Docker containers with auto APIs

entries.name: LightLLM
entries.description: Lightweight LLM inference and serving framework with continuous batching, tensor parallelism, and efficient memory management.
entries.tagline: Lightweight LLM serving with continuous batching

entries.name: TFX
entries.description: End-to-end platform for deploying production ML pipelines with data validation, transformation, training, evaluation, and serving components (Google).
entries.tagline: End-to-end production ML pipeline platform from Google

categories.name: Automated Monitoring and Observability
categories.description: Automated drift detection, performance monitoring, and quality assurance for deployed models.

entries.name: Evidently
entries.description: ML and LLM observability with 100+ metrics for evaluating, testing, and monitoring any AI system in production.
entries.tagline: ML and LLM observability with 100+ production metrics

entries.name: Giskard
entries.description: Testing and evaluation for ML and LLM models covering bias, performance regression, and security vulnerabilities.
entries.tagline: ML and LLM testing for bias and security vulnerabilities

entries.name: Deepchecks
entries.description: Holistic ML validation covering data integrity, drift detection, and model evaluation in a single suite.
entries.tagline: Holistic ML validation suite for data and models

entries.name: WhyLogs
entries.description: Lightweight data logging library that profiles datasets for drift detection without storing raw data.
entries.tagline: Lightweight drift detection without storing raw data

entries.name: Alibi Detect
entries.description: Outlier, adversarial, and drift detection algorithms for tabular, text, image, and time-series data (Seldon).
entries.tagline: Outlier, adversarial, and drift detection across data types

entries.name: NannyML
entries.description: Estimate model performance without ground truth labels and link data drift directly to accuracy degradation.
entries.tagline: Estimate model performance without ground truth labels

entries.name: OpenLLMetry
entries.description: OpenTelemetry-based observability for LLM applications with automatic instrumentation for LangChain, LlamaIndex, and OpenAI SDK.
entries.tagline: OpenTelemetry observability with auto-instrumentation for LLMs

entries.name: Helicone
entries.description: LLM observability platform with one-line integration for cost tracking, latency analysis, prompt versioning, and usage dashboards (YC W23).
entries.tagline: One-line LLM observability for cost and latency tracking

categories.name: Automated AI Safety
categories.description: Automated testing, red-teaming, and guardrails for ensuring AI system safety and reliability.

entries.name: Garak
entries.description: LLM vulnerability scanner with 100+ attack modules covering prompt injection, data leakage, and jailbreaking.
entries.tagline: LLM vulnerability scanner with 100+ attack modules

entries.name: Guardrails AI
entries.description: Framework for adding structural and semantic validation guardrails to LLM outputs.
entries.tagline: Structural and semantic validation guardrails for LLM outputs

entries.name: Plano
entries.description: AI-native proxy with built-in orchestration, safety controls, and observability for agentic applications.
entries.tagline: AI-native proxy with safety controls for agentic apps

entries.name: NeMo Guardrails
entries.description: Programmable safety rails for LLM-based conversational systems with topical and safety controls (NVIDIA).
entries.tagline: Programmable topical and safety rails for LLM conversations

entries.name: DeepTeam
entries.description: Red-teaming framework for systematically testing LLM vulnerabilities across multiple attack vectors.
entries.tagline: Systematic red-teaming for LLM vulnerabilities

entries.name: LLM Guard
entries.description: Security toolkit with input/output scanners for prompt injection, data leakage, toxic content, and other safety risks in production LLM applications.
entries.tagline: Input/output scanners for prompt injection and leakage

categories.name: AutoML Benchmarks
categories.description: Standardized frameworks and datasets for evaluating and comparing AutoML systems.

entries.name: MLE-Bench
entries.description: Benchmark using 75 Kaggle competitions to evaluate ML engineering agents (OpenAI).
entries.tagline: 75 Kaggle competitions for evaluating ML agents

entries.name: NAS-Bench-101
entries.description: Benchmark dataset with 423,624 evaluated neural architectures for efficient NAS research (Google).
entries.tagline: 423,624 evaluated neural architectures for NAS research

entries.name: NAS-Bench-201
entries.description: Reproducible benchmark with 15,625 evaluated architectures across three datasets for fair NAS comparison.
entries.tagline: 15,625 architectures across three datasets for fair NAS

entries.name: AMLB
entries.description: Standard AutoML benchmark comparing frameworks across 104 classification and regression tasks (OpenML).
entries.tagline: Standard benchmark comparing AutoML frameworks across 104 tasks

entries.name: TabArena
entries.description: Living benchmark for tabular ML with continuously maintained leaderboard and best-practice evaluation (NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight).
entries.tagline: Living leaderboard for tabular ML best practices

entries.description: End-to-end ML lifecycle platform with experiment tracking, model registry, and integrated prompt optimization.

entries.name: Langfuse
entries.description: Open-source LLM engineering platform with tracing, evaluations, prompt management, and cost analytics.

entries.name: Prefect
entries.description: Modern data workflow automation with retries, caching, and real-time logging.

entries.name: Opik
entries.description: LLM debugging, evaluation, and monitoring platform with detailed tracing and quality dashboards (Comet).

entries.description: Experiment tracking, visualization, and collaboration platform for ML teams (Weights and Biases).

entries.description: Framework for reproducible, maintainable ML pipelines with clean coding patterns.

entries.name: Metaflow
entries.description: Human-centric framework for managing real-life data science and ML projects at scale (Netflix).

entries.name: Phoenix
entries.description: AI observability platform with OpenTelemetry-native tracing and LLM evaluation dashboards (Arize).

entries.description: Open-source feature store for managing and serving ML features in real-time and batch inference.

entries.name: ClearML
entries.description: Unified experiment manager, pipeline orchestrator, and data/model management platform.

entries.description: Self-hosted experiment tracker with a high-performance UI that handles 10,000+ training runs.
